steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: On the left: plural noun subject (Barrada's pieces) modified by a participial phrase. On the right: direct object (the ways humans attempt to organize and regulate nature).

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: The rule is subject-verb agreement; B (explore) is the plural finite verb required to match the plural subject. A and C are singular verbs, while D is a participle that cannot function as a main verb. That matches choice B — B is correct.
